functions.name: convert
functions.description: Transforms an incoming TrainUpdate into an array of SmarTrakEvent objects, filtering out non-progress updates and non-relevant stations, then mapping allocated vehicle labels to events.
functions.outputs: Array of SmarTrakEvent (may be empty when filtered)

functions.name: isR9KRelevantStation
functions.description: Checks whether the provided station (by stop_code) is among the configured filterStations mapping via STATION_ID_TO_STOP_CODE_MAP.

functions.name: getMovementType
functions.description: Maps a ChangeType numeric value to a MovementType classification (ARRIVAL, DEPARTURE, PREDICTION, OTHER).

functions.name: toSmartrakEvent
functions.description: Constructs a SmarTrakEvent Location payload from vehicle label, station coordinates, and train update creation date, populating event, message, remote and location data fields.
functions.inputs: vehicleLabel: string, station: { stop_lat: number, stop_lon: number }, trainUpdateCreationDate: string

functions.name: ChangeTypeConverter.serialize
functions.description: Serialises a ChangeType enum value to a number forcing numeric representation.

functions.name: ChangeTypeConverter.deserialize
functions.description: Deserialises a number into a ChangeType enum value by numeric coercion.

functions.name: BooleanConverter.serialize
functions.description: Serialises a boolean to its string representation 'true' or 'false'.

functions.name: BooleanConverter.deserialize
functions.description: Deserialises a string 'true' or other into a boolean (strict equality to 'true').

functions.name: NumberConverter.serialize
functions.description: Serialises a number to its string form.

functions.name: NumberConverter.deserialize
functions.description: Deserialises a numeric string to a number via Number().

functions.name: getStopInfoByStopCode
functions.description: Finds stop information (code, latitude, longitude) matching the provided stop code within the cached stops array.
functions.outputs: { stop_code: string, stop_lat: number, stop_lon: number } | undefined

functions.name: deserializeAndValidate
functions.description: Deserialises an XML message string into a Message object and validates presence of train update changes, actual arrival/departure time, and acceptable delay bounds against configured thresholds.
errors: Received invalid message, reason: outdated, delay in seconds: ${messageDelay} ${messageStr}
Received invalid message, reason: wrong time, delay in seconds: ${messageDelay} ${messageStr}
